text: The surgeon has completed the release of the gastric fundus, reflecting the surrounding tissue to expose the surgical zone.

The surgeon performs a myotomy extending five centimeters towards the gastric reservoir. A partial wrap is completed, and the fundus is derived, marking the completion of the first layer of the procedure.
The surgeon focuses on the left aspect of the myotomy, highlighting the lens of the myotomy. The right border of the myotomy is also visible, and a partial wrap is performed.
Marshall, clock, communication. Gas pouch, elementary pouch.
